productDisplayName: Nike Men Football Soccer Red Jerseys
description: CompositionArsenal crew neck jersey made of Dri-Fit 100% recycled polyester, has an authentic jock tag at left hem and a nike swoosh on right chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separatle in cold waterDo not use softeners or bleachDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not line dryDo not dry clean Do not ironThe 2011/12 Arsenal Jersey pays tribute to the “Great Innovator's” influence with the traditional red body and white sleeves that have come to define the team. Distinctive design details and breathability offer comfort on and off the field.This 2011/12 Arsenal Official home/Away Soccer Jersey features a silicone screen-print club crest at the left chest, and behind it - on the inside, close to the heart of those dedicated to the game-- with the printed “Victoria Concordia Crescent”. A screen-print sponsor logo spans the centre chest for a nod to the backers of the team, while a club graphic and league badge adorn the centre back and right sleeve. And, this jersey has finished hems to prevent fraying and deliver a polished look. Lightweight and breathable, the Arsenal Jersey was designed with the environment in mind. Its sweat-wicking Dri-FIT fabric was made from the equivalent of eight recycled plastic bottles. Dri-FIT mesh panels down the sides enhance ventilation in high-heat areas.
